text:
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that a workflow run failed in the jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary indicating 3 alerts from loop-monitor require attention.
- [reply needed] Barry: Barry shared a NYTimes article about AI in university curriculum that he thought Michael would find interesting.
- [decision required] David Purdy: GitHub invitation to collaborate on the 5mts/sainthelens repository.
- [decision required] David Purdy: GitHub invitation to collaborate on the 5mts/regionflex repository.
- [decision required] David Purdy: GitHub invitation to collaborate on the 5mts/electup repository.
- [decision required] David Purdy: GitHub invitation to collaborate on the 5mts/map-sniffer repository.
- [decision required] David Purdy: GitHub invitation to collaborate on the 5mts/electup-embed repository.
- [decision required] David Purdy: GitHub invitation to collaborate on the 5mts/tahoma repository.
- [follow up] David Purdy: David Purdy apologizes for pushing and explains a client is asking about maps, indicating the ball is back in Michael's court on the Setup project.
- [follow up] David Purdy: David Purdy asks if Michael has made progress on RegionFlex districts and whether he has questions, as a Florida organization is preparing to publish.
